# MasterChess

> Play chess online vs players or AI bots, join free daily tournaments, analyze games with Stockfish, and learn openings — a premium, no-puzzles chess platform built on real human play.

MasterChess is a competitive chess platform built around authentic human play. Features include online matchmaking, bot opponents across rating tiers (400–2000 ELO), free daily Swiss tournaments, master courses, openings explorer, AI-assisted post-game review (analysis only, never during live play), live streams from DailyChess_12, and an active social community. Zero fake numbers, zero ghost players, zero engine assistance in human games.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Live activity, daily missions, featured modes, community trust strip.
- [Play vs Bots](/play): Match 9 bot personalities across all rating tiers.
- [Play Online](/play/online): Real-time ELO matchmaking against humans.
- [Tournaments](/tournaments): Free daily and weekly Swiss tournaments.
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Global rating ladder.
- [Learn](/learn): Master courses, openings guides, training drills.
- [Blog](/blog): In-depth chess articles, opening theory, history, tactics.
- [Openings Trainer](/openings): Interactive openings with explore + train modes.
- [Opening Explorer](/opening-explorer): Move-tree explorer with Lichess data.
- [Analysis](/analysis): Stockfish-powered post-game analysis.
- [Training](/training): Tactical drills and mate-in-N exercises.
- [Coach](/coach): AI Grandmaster-level personal chess coach.
- [Community](/community): Chess Moments feed, badges, followers.
- [Clubs](/clubs): Player clubs, leaderboards, club chat.
- [Stream Hub](/live): DailyChess_12 live streams and content.
- [Stats](/stats): Personal performance breakdown.
- [About](/about): About MasterChess and the DailyChess_12 method.
- [Fair Play](/fair-play): How we keep chess authentic — no engines in PvP, manual review.
- [Referrals](/referrals): Invite friends, earn Pioneer badge + XP bonuses.
